analysis: The project appears to be a web-based presentation or interactive site about black holes, with multiple directories (test-website, github-page, docs) containing HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files. The existing to-dos indicate that the site is intended to have a dark, cosmic theme with animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The theme should be consistent across all pages and include mobile-friendly navigation.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS with a cosmic dark theme, including radial gradients for a space-like background, CSS animations for swirling black hole effects, glowing text and button effects, and smooth transitions for interactive elements.
Update the HTML structure to include a mobile-friendly hamburger menu, sections for black hole information, and interactive animated slides with smooth navigation.
Fix syntax errors, implement smooth slide transitions, add event listeners for mobile menu toggle, and ensure all buttons have proper functionality for navigation and animations.
Apply the same cosmic dark theme and animations as in test-website to ensure visual consistency across all pages.
Ensure the HTML structure matches the test-website for consistency, including mobile navigation and black hole content sections.
Implement the same interactive features and animations as in test-website to maintain a unified user experience.
Apply the cosmic dark theme and animations to the docs directory for visual consistency across all project pages.
Ensure the HTML structure in docs matches the other directories for a cohesive user experience.
Implement the same interactive and animated features as in test-website to maintain consistency across all project pages.
